creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Helge Oldach wrote:
> Ooops, the patch was broken.
>
> Here's a corrected one that I have tested and it actually works.
>
> Helge
>
> --- bsd.port.mk.ctm	Sat Aug  5 00:46:27 2006
> +++ bsd.port.mk	Wed Aug  9 07:50:02 2006
> @@ -5581,13 +5581,13 @@
>  	fi
>  	@${RM} -rf ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}
>  .endif
> -.if !exists(${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME})
> -.if !defined(DESTDIR)
> -		@${ECHO_MSG} "===>   Registering installation for ${PKGNAME}"
> -.else
> -		@${ECHO_MSG} "===>   Registering installation for ${PKGNAME} in ${DESTDIR}"
> -.endif
> -		@${MKDIR} ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}; \
> +	@if [ ! -d ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME} ]; then \
> +		if [ -z "${DESTDIR}" ] ; then \
> +			${ECHO_MSG} "===>   Registering installation for ${PKGNAME}"; \
> +		else \
> +			${ECHO_MSG} "===>   Registering installation for ${PKGNAME} in ${DESTDIR}"; \
> +		fi; \
> +		${MKDIR} ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}; \
>  		${PKG_CMD} ${PKG_ARGS} -O ${PKGFILE} > ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}/+CONTENTS; \
>  		${CP} ${DESCR} ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}/+DESC; \
>  		${ECHO_CMD} ${COMMENT:Q} > ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}/+COMMENT; \
> @@ -5610,8 +5610,8 @@
>  					${ECHO_CMD} ${PKGNAME} >> ${PKG_DBDIR}/$$dep/+REQUIRED_BY; \
>  				fi; \
>  			fi; \
> -		done
> -.endif
> +		done; \
> +	fi
>  .if !defined(NO_MTREE)
>  	@if [ -f ${MTREE_FILE} ]; then \
>  		${CP} ${MTREE_FILE} ${PKG_DBDIR}/${PKGNAME}/+MTREE_DIRS; \
>
>   
Thanks, I already corrected the issue and it is being tested on the 
package building cluster.

-- 
Cheers,

Gabor
